---
title: "Medicaid Provider Spending EDA (DuckDB + Python)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 5
    df-print: paged
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  error: false
jupyter: hypercap-cc-nlp
---

## Purpose

This notebook performs SQL-first exploratory data analysis (EDA) on `medicaid-provider-spending.parquet` using DuckDB.
It is designed for a large file and keeps memory use low by:

1. Reading parquet lazily through DuckDB.
2. Aggregating in SQL first.
3. Moving only small summary tables to pandas for plotting.

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import re
import random
from typing import Optional

import duckdb
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import pyarrow as pa

# Deterministic seed
RANDOM_SEED = 42
random.seed(RANDOM_SEED)
np.random.seed(RANDOM_SEED)

# Notebook parameters/constants
NOTEBOOK_DIR = Path.cwd()
DATA_PATH = NOTEBOOK_DIR / "medicaid-provider-spending.parquet"
FIG_DIR = NOTEBOOK_DIR / "figures"
OUTPUT_DIR = NOTEBOOK_DIR / "outputs"
FIG_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
OUTPUT_DIR.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

PRIMARY_SPEND_CANDIDATES = [
    "total_spending",
    "total_payment",
    "total_paid",
    "amount_paid",
    "payment_amount",
    "spending_amount",
    "medicaid_spending",
]
TOP_N = 20
MIN_VOLUME_FILTER = 11
TARGET_NPI = "1295199313"
NPI_SCOPE = "either"
HCPCS_TOP_N = 20
MIN_HCPCS_CLAIMS_FOR_CPP = 1000

# Known schema column names for NPI-specific analysis.
BILLING_NPI_COL = "BILLING_PROVIDER_NPI_NUM"
SERVICING_NPI_COL = "SERVICING_PROVIDER_NPI_NUM"
MONTH_COL = "CLAIM_FROM_MONTH"
HCPCS_COL = "HCPCS_CODE"
CLAIMS_COL = "TOTAL_CLAIMS"
PAID_COL = "TOTAL_PAID"

sns.set_theme(style="whitegrid")
plt.rcParams["figure.dpi"] = 110


def qident(name: str) -> str:
    return '"' + name.replace('"', '""') + '"'


def is_numeric_duckdb_type(type_name: str) -> bool:
    t = str(type_name).upper()
    numeric_markers = (
        "TINYINT",
        "SMALLINT",
        "INTEGER",
        "BIGINT",
        "HUGEINT",
        "UTINYINT",
        "USMALLINT",
        "UINTEGER",
        "UBIGINT",
        "UHUGEINT",
        "FLOAT",
        "DOUBLE",
        "REAL",
        "DECIMAL",
    )
    return any(marker in t for marker in numeric_markers)


def detect_column_roles(schema_df: pd.DataFrame) -> dict[str, list[str]]:
    """
    Detect semantic roles from column names and SQL types.
    Returns role -> list of candidate column names.
    """
    patterns = {
        "provider_id": re.compile(r"(?:^|_)(npi|provider(_id)?|prov(_id)?|prescriber|billing)(?:$|_)", re.I),
        "year": re.compile(r"(?:^|_)(year|yr|fiscal_year|calendar_year)(?:$|_)", re.I),
        "date": re.compile(r"(?:^|_)(date|month|quarter|period|service_date)(?:$|_)", re.I),
        "geo": re.compile(r"(?:^|_)(state|county|zip|zipcode|fips|region|city)(?:$|_)", re.I),
        "spend": re.compile(r"(?:^|_)(spend|payment|paid|allowed|reimb|charge|cost|amount|total)(?:$|_)", re.I),
        "volume": re.compile(r"(?:^|_)(claim|service|visit|encounter|beneficiary|bene|member|patient|count|volume|utilization)(?:$|_)", re.I),
        "specialty": re.compile(r"(?:^|_)(specialty|provider_type|prvdr_type)(?:$|_)", re.I),
        "taxonomy": re.compile(r"(?:^|_)(taxonomy)(?:$|_)", re.I),
        "id": re.compile(r"(?:^|_)(id|identifier|key)(?:$|_)", re.I),
    }

    roles: dict[str, list[str]] = {key: [] for key in patterns}
    roles["numeric"] = []
    roles["categorical"] = []

    for row in schema_df.itertuples(index=False):
        col = str(row.column_name)
        col_type = str(row.column_type)
        col_lower = col.lower()

        if is_numeric_duckdb_type(col_type):
            roles["numeric"].append(col)
        else:
            roles["categorical"].append(col)

        for role, pattern in patterns.items():
            if pattern.search(col_lower):
                roles[role].append(col)

    # De-duplicate while preserving order
    for k, v in roles.items():
        roles[k] = list(dict.fromkeys(v))

    return roles


def first_existing(candidates: list[str], all_columns: list[str]) -> Optional[str]:
    for c in candidates:
        if c in all_columns:
            return c
    return None


def safe_ratio(numerator: float, denominator: float) -> float:
    if denominator is None or pd.isna(denominator) or denominator == 0:
        return np.nan
    return float(numerator) / float(denominator)


def build_provider_long_view(scope: str, source_relation: str = "medicaid_spending") -> str:
    scope = scope.lower()
    if scope not in {"either", "billing", "servicing"}:
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported scope: {scope}")

    billing_select = f"""
        SELECT
            CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_npi,
            CAST({qident(MONTH_COL)} AS VARCHAR) AS claim_month,
            CAST({qident(HCPCS_COL)} AS VARCHAR) AS hcpcs_code,
            TRY_CAST({qident(CLAIMS_COL)} AS DOUBLE) AS total_claims,
            TRY_CAST({qident(PAID_COL)} AS DOUBLE) AS total_paid,
            'billing' AS provider_role
        FROM {source_relation}
        WHERE {qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} IS NOT NULL
    """

    servicing_select = f"""
        SELECT
            CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_npi,
            CAST({qident(MONTH_COL)} AS VARCHAR) AS claim_month,
            CAST({qident(HCPCS_COL)} AS VARCHAR) AS hcpcs_code,
            TRY_CAST({qident(CLAIMS_COL)} AS DOUBLE) AS total_claims,
            TRY_CAST({qident(PAID_COL)} AS DOUBLE) AS total_paid,
            'servicing' AS provider_role
        FROM {source_relation}
        WHERE {qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} IS NOT NULL
    """

    if scope == "billing":
        return billing_select
    if scope == "servicing":
        return servicing_select

    return f"""
        {billing_select}
        UNION ALL
        {servicing_select}
          AND ({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} IS NULL OR {qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} <> {qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)})
    """


print("Python:", pd.__version__)
print("DuckDB:", duckdb.__version__)
print("PyArrow:", pa.__version__)
print("Data path:", DATA_PATH)
print("Data exists:", DATA_PATH.exists())
```

## Ingestion Layer (DuckDB View)

```{python}
assert DATA_PATH.exists(), f"Data file not found: {DATA_PATH}"

con = duckdb.connect(database=":memory:")
con.execute("PRAGMA threads=4;")
parquet_path_sql = str(DATA_PATH).replace("'", "''")
con.execute(f"CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW medicaid_spending AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{parquet_path_sql}');")

row_count = int(con.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM medicaid_spending").fetchdf().loc[0, "n"])
assert row_count > 0, "Ingestion check failed: row count must be > 0"

schema_df = con.execute("DESCRIBE SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending").fetchdf()
schema_df = schema_df.rename(columns={"column_name": "column_name", "column_type": "column_type"})
all_cols = schema_df["column_name"].tolist()
roles = detect_column_roles(schema_df)

print(f"Rows: {row_count:,}")
print(f"Columns: {len(all_cols)}")
schema_df.head(20)
```

```{python}
role_rows = []
for role_name in ["provider_id", "year", "date", "geo", "spend", "volume", "specialty", "taxonomy", "id"]:
    role_rows.append(
        {
            "role": role_name,
            "n_candidates": len(roles.get(role_name, [])),
            "candidates": ", ".join(roles.get(role_name, [])[:10]),
        }
    )
role_df = pd.DataFrame(role_rows)
role_df
```

```{python}
numeric_cols = roles.get("numeric", [])
categorical_cols = roles.get("categorical", [])

primary_spend_col = None
lower_to_col = {c.lower(): c for c in all_cols}
for candidate in PRIMARY_SPEND_CANDIDATES:
    if candidate in lower_to_col and lower_to_col[candidate] in numeric_cols:
        primary_spend_col = lower_to_col[candidate]
        break

if primary_spend_col is None:
    spend_numeric_candidates = [c for c in roles.get("spend", []) if c in numeric_cols]
    primary_spend_col = spend_numeric_candidates[0] if spend_numeric_candidates else None

provider_col = first_existing(roles.get("provider_id", []) + roles.get("id", []), all_cols)
year_col = first_existing(roles.get("year", []) + roles.get("date", []), all_cols)
volume_col = first_existing([c for c in roles.get("volume", []) if c in numeric_cols], all_cols)

print("Selected analysis columns:")
print("  primary_spend_col:", primary_spend_col)
print("  provider_col     :", provider_col)
print("  year_col         :", year_col)
print("  volume_col       :", volume_col)
print("  numeric_cols     :", len(numeric_cols))
print("  categorical_cols :", len(categorical_cols))

# Runtime cap for heavy aggregations that otherwise require full-table grouping.
HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS = int(min(row_count, 500_000))
print("  heavy_query_sample_rows:", HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS)

required_hcpcs_cols = [HCPCS_COL, CLAIMS_COL, PAID_COL]
required_npi_cols = [BILLING_NPI_COL, SERVICING_NPI_COL, MONTH_COL, HCPCS_COL, CLAIMS_COL, PAID_COL]
has_required_hcpcs_cols = all(c in all_cols for c in required_hcpcs_cols)
has_required_npi_cols = all(c in all_cols for c in required_npi_cols)
print("  has_required_hcpcs_cols:", has_required_hcpcs_cols)
print("  has_required_npi_cols  :", has_required_npi_cols)

# Cross-section status flags used in final validation checks.
hcpcs_rankings_generated = False
npi_present_in_data = False
npi_section_completed = False
```

## Data Quality Diagnostics

### Missingness (% Missing by Column)

```{python}
missing_exprs = [
    f"SUM(CASE WHEN {qident(c)} IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS {qident(c)}"
    for c in all_cols
]
missing_sql = "SELECT " + ", ".join(missing_exprs) + ", COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM medicaid_spending"
missing_wide = con.execute(missing_sql).fetchdf()

total_rows = int(missing_wide.loc[0, "total_rows"])
missing_long = (
    missing_wide.drop(columns=["total_rows"])
    .T.reset_index()
    .rename(columns={"index": "column_name", 0: "missing_n"})
)
missing_long["missing_n"] = missing_long["missing_n"].astype("int64")
missing_long["pct_missing"] = (100.0 * missing_long["missing_n"] / total_rows).astype(float)
missing_long = missing_long.sort_values("pct_missing", ascending=False)

assert missing_long["pct_missing"].between(0, 100).all(), "Missingness must be in [0, 100]"

missing_top30 = missing_long.head(30).reset_index(drop=True)
missing_top30.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "missingness_top30.csv", index=False)
missing_top30
```

### Cardinality (Categorical Columns)

```{python}
if len(categorical_cols) == 0:
    print("Skipped: no categorical columns detected.")
    cardinality_top30 = pd.DataFrame()
else:
    # Cardinality can be expensive on a very large file; use a tighter bounded sample.
    card_cols = categorical_cols[:20]
    cardinality_sample_rows = int(min(row_count, 200_000))
    card_exprs = [f"APPROX_COUNT_DISTINCT({qident(c)}) AS {qident(c)}" for c in card_cols]
    card_sql = (
        "SELECT "
        + ", ".join(card_exprs)
        + f" FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {cardinality_sample_rows} ROWS (reservoir)"
    )
    card_wide = con.execute(card_sql).fetchdf()

    cardinality_long = (
        card_wide.T.reset_index()
        .rename(columns={"index": "column_name", 0: "approx_distinct"})
        .sort_values("approx_distinct", ascending=False)
    )
    cardinality_long["sample_rows_used"] = cardinality_sample_rows
    cardinality_top30 = cardinality_long.head(30).reset_index(drop=True)
    cardinality_top30.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "categorical_cardinality_top30.csv", index=False)
    cardinality_top30
```

### Duplicate Checks (Provider/Time Keys)

```{python}
if provider_col is None:
    print("Skipped: no provider identifier candidate detected.")
    duplicate_summary = pd.DataFrame()
    duplicate_examples = pd.DataFrame()
else:
    if year_col is not None:
        dup_sql = f"""
        WITH base AS (
            SELECT
                CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_id,
                CAST({qident(year_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS period
            FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
        )
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
            COUNT(DISTINCT provider_id) AS distinct_providers,
            COUNT(DISTINCT provider_id || '|' || COALESCE(period, 'NULL')) AS distinct_provider_period,
            COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT provider_id || '|' || COALESCE(period, 'NULL')) AS duplicate_provider_period_rows
        FROM base
        """
        duplicate_summary = con.execute(dup_sql).fetchdf()

        dup_examples_sql = f"""
        WITH base AS (
            SELECT
                CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_id,
                CAST({qident(year_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS period
            FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
        )
        SELECT provider_id, period, COUNT(*) AS n_rows
        FROM base
        GROUP BY 1, 2
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
        ORDER BY n_rows DESC
        LIMIT 20
        """
        duplicate_examples = con.execute(dup_examples_sql).fetchdf()
    else:
        dup_sql = f"""
        SELECT
            COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
            COUNT(DISTINCT CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR)) AS distinct_providers,
            COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR)) AS duplicate_provider_rows
        FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
        """
        duplicate_summary = con.execute(dup_sql).fetchdf()

        dup_examples_sql = f"""
        SELECT
            CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_id,
            COUNT(*) AS n_rows
        FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
        GROUP BY 1
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
        ORDER BY n_rows DESC
        LIMIT 20
        """
        duplicate_examples = con.execute(dup_examples_sql).fetchdf()

    duplicate_summary.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "duplicate_key_summary.csv", index=False)
    duplicate_examples.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "duplicate_key_examples_top20.csv", index=False)
    duplicate_summary
```

```{python}
if provider_col is not None:
    duplicate_examples
```

### Numeric Sanity Checks

```{python}
numeric_focus = list(dict.fromkeys(roles.get("spend", []) + roles.get("volume", [])))
numeric_focus = [c for c in numeric_focus if c in all_cols][:20]
if not numeric_focus:
    numeric_focus = numeric_cols[:12]

if len(numeric_focus) == 0:
    print("Skipped: no numeric columns detected.")
    numeric_sanity = pd.DataFrame()
else:
    sanity_exprs = []
    for c in numeric_focus:
        c_id = qident(c)
        sanity_exprs.extend(
            [
                f"MIN(TRY_CAST({c_id} AS DOUBLE)) AS {qident(c + '__min')}",
                f"MAX(TRY_CAST({c_id} AS DOUBLE)) AS {qident(c + '__max')}",
                f"AVG(CASE WHEN TRY_CAST({c_id} AS DOUBLE) < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS {qident(c + '__pct_negative')}",
                f"AVG(CASE WHEN TRY_CAST({c_id} AS DOUBLE) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS {qident(c + '__pct_zero')}",
                f"AVG(CASE WHEN {c_id} IS NOT NULL AND TRY_CAST({c_id} AS DOUBLE) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS {qident(c + '__pct_failed_cast')}",
            ]
        )

    sanity_sql = (
        "SELECT "
        + ", ".join(sanity_exprs)
        + f" FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data"
    )
    sanity_wide = con.execute(sanity_sql).fetchdf()

    rows = []
    for c in numeric_focus:
        rows.append(
            {
                "column_name": c,
                "min_value": sanity_wide.loc[0, c + "__min"],
                "max_value": sanity_wide.loc[0, c + "__max"],
                "pct_negative": float(sanity_wide.loc[0, c + "__pct_negative"] or 0) * 100.0,
                "pct_zero": float(sanity_wide.loc[0, c + "__pct_zero"] or 0) * 100.0,
                "pct_failed_cast": float(sanity_wide.loc[0, c + "__pct_failed_cast"] or 0) * 100.0,
            }
        )

    numeric_sanity = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values("pct_negative", ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
    numeric_sanity.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "numeric_sanity_checks.csv", index=False)
    numeric_sanity
```

### Type-Casting Audit for Numeric-Like Text Columns

```{python}
numeric_like_name = re.compile(
    r"(spend|payment|paid|charge|cost|amount|total|claim|beneficiary|bene|service|count|volume|utilization|rate|pct|percent)",
    re.I,
)
varchar_markers = ("VARCHAR", "CHAR", "STRING", "TEXT")

text_numeric_like_cols = []
for row in schema_df.itertuples(index=False):
    col = str(row.column_name)
    typ = str(row.column_type).upper()
    if any(marker in typ for marker in varchar_markers) and numeric_like_name.search(col.lower()):
        text_numeric_like_cols.append(col)

text_numeric_like_cols = text_numeric_like_cols[:20]

if len(text_numeric_like_cols) == 0:
    print("Skipped: no numeric-like text columns detected.")
    cast_audit = pd.DataFrame()
else:
    audit_exprs = []
    for c in text_numeric_like_cols:
        c_id = qident(c)
        cleaned = f"REGEXP_REPLACE({c_id}, '[^0-9\\\\.-]', '', 'g')"
        audit_exprs.extend(
            [
                f"AVG(CASE WHEN {c_id} IS NOT NULL AND TRY_CAST({cleaned} AS DOUBLE) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS {qident(c + '__pct_parseable')}",
                f"AVG(CASE WHEN {c_id} IS NOT NULL AND TRY_CAST({cleaned} AS DOUBLE) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS {qident(c + '__pct_not_parseable')}",
            ]
        )

    audit_sql = (
        "SELECT "
        + ", ".join(audit_exprs)
        + f" FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data"
    )
    audit_wide = con.execute(audit_sql).fetchdf()

    rows = []
    for c in text_numeric_like_cols:
        rows.append(
            {
                "column_name": c,
                "pct_parseable_numeric": float(audit_wide.loc[0, c + "__pct_parseable"] or 0) * 100.0,
                "pct_not_parseable_numeric": float(audit_wide.loc[0, c + "__pct_not_parseable"] or 0) * 100.0,
            }
        )

    cast_audit = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values("pct_not_parseable_numeric", ascending=False).reset_index(drop=True)
    cast_audit.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "type_casting_audit_numeric_like_text.csv", index=False)
    cast_audit
```

## Distribution and Concentration Analysis

### Primary Spend Histogram (Linear + Log)

```{python}
if primary_spend_col is None:
    print("Skipped: no spend-like numeric column detected.")
else:
    spend_sql = f"""
    WITH sampled AS (
        SELECT TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE) AS spend_value
        FROM medicaid_spending
        USING SAMPLE 200000 ROWS (reservoir)
    )
    SELECT spend_value
    FROM sampled
    WHERE spend_value IS NOT NULL
    """
    spend_sample = con.execute(spend_sql).fetchdf()

    if spend_sample.empty:
        print("Skipped: no non-null values available for primary spend metric.")
    else:
        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 4.5))
        sns.histplot(spend_sample["spend_value"], bins=60, ax=axes[0], color="#2a6f97")
        axes[0].set_title(f"Distribution of {primary_spend_col} (sampled)")
        axes[0].set_xlabel(primary_spend_col)
        axes[0].set_ylabel("Count")

        positive = spend_sample.loc[spend_sample["spend_value"] > 0, "spend_value"]
        if len(positive) > 0:
            sns.histplot(np.log10(positive), bins=60, ax=axes[1], color="#ee6c4d")
            axes[1].set_title(f"log10 Distribution of {primary_spend_col} (>0)")
            axes[1].set_xlabel(f"log10({primary_spend_col})")
            axes[1].set_ylabel("Count")
        else:
            axes[1].text(0.5, 0.5, "No positive spend values", ha="center", va="center")
            axes[1].set_axis_off()

        plt.tight_layout()
        plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / "histograms_primary_spend.png", bbox_inches="tight")
        plt.show()
```

### Spend by Year (Boxplot)

```{python}
if primary_spend_col is None or year_col is None:
    print("Skipped: requires both spend and year/date columns.")
else:
    year_levels_sql = f"""
    SELECT CAST({qident(year_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS period_label, COUNT(*) AS n_rows
    FROM medicaid_spending
    WHERE {qident(year_col)} IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY n_rows DESC
    LIMIT 12
    """
    period_levels = con.execute(year_levels_sql).fetchdf()

    if period_levels.empty:
        print("Skipped: no non-null year/date values found.")
    else:
        labels = period_levels["period_label"].tolist()
        labels_sql = ", ".join(["'" + x.replace("'", "''") + "'" for x in labels])
        by_year_sql = f"""
        WITH sampled AS (
            SELECT
                CAST({qident(year_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS period_label,
                TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE) AS spend_value
            FROM medicaid_spending
            USING SAMPLE 250000 ROWS (reservoir)
        )
        SELECT period_label, spend_value
        FROM sampled
        WHERE period_label IN ({labels_sql}) AND spend_value IS NOT NULL
        """
        by_year = con.execute(by_year_sql).fetchdf()

        if by_year.empty:
            print("Skipped: sampled spend-by-period data is empty.")
        else:
            plt.figure(figsize=(12, 4.8))
            sns.boxplot(
                data=by_year,
                x="period_label",
                y="spend_value",
                showfliers=False,
                color="#8ecae6",
            )
            plt.yscale("log")
            plt.xlabel(year_col)
            plt.ylabel(primary_spend_col + " (log scale)")
            plt.title(f"{primary_spend_col} by {year_col} (sampled)")
            plt.tight_layout()
            plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / "boxplot_spend_by_year.png", bbox_inches="tight")
            plt.show()
```

### Lorenz-Style Concentration Curve

```{python}
concentration_curve = pd.DataFrame()
if primary_spend_col is None or provider_col is None:
    print("Skipped: requires provider identifier and spend column.")
else:
    lorenz_sql = f"""
    WITH provider_totals AS (
        SELECT
            CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_id,
            SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_spend
        FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
        WHERE {qident(provider_col)} IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY 1
        HAVING SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) > 0
    ),
    binned AS (
        SELECT
            NTILE(1000) OVER (ORDER BY total_spend) AS spend_bin,
            total_spend
        FROM provider_totals
    ),
    agg AS (
        SELECT
            spend_bin,
            COUNT(*) AS n_providers_bin,
            SUM(total_spend) AS spend_bin_total
        FROM binned
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    cum AS (
        SELECT
            spend_bin,
            SUM(n_providers_bin) OVER (ORDER BY spend_bin) AS cum_providers,
            SUM(spend_bin_total) OVER (ORDER BY spend_bin) AS cum_spend,
            SUM(n_providers_bin) OVER () AS total_providers,
            SUM(spend_bin_total) OVER () AS total_spend
        FROM agg
    )
    SELECT
        spend_bin,
        cum_providers * 1.0 / NULLIF(total_providers, 0) AS cum_provider_share,
        cum_spend * 1.0 / NULLIF(total_spend, 0) AS cum_spend_share
    FROM cum
    ORDER BY spend_bin
    """
    concentration_curve = con.execute(lorenz_sql).fetchdf()

    if concentration_curve.empty:
        print("Skipped: no valid provider-level spend totals found.")
    else:
        plt.figure(figsize=(6.5, 6.0))
        plt.plot(
            concentration_curve["cum_provider_share"],
            concentration_curve["cum_spend_share"],
            color="#264653",
            linewidth=2.0,
            label="Observed concentration",
        )
        plt.plot([0, 1], [0, 1], linestyle="--", color="gray", label="Perfect equality")
        plt.xlabel("Cumulative share of providers")
        plt.ylabel("Cumulative share of spending")
        plt.title(f"Lorenz-style curve for {primary_spend_col}")
        plt.legend()
        plt.tight_layout()
        plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / "lorenz_curve_primary_spend.png", bbox_inches="tight")
        plt.show()

        concentration_curve.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "lorenz_curve_points.csv", index=False)
```

### Top-Share Table (Top 1%, 5%, 10%)

```{python}
top_share = pd.DataFrame()
if primary_spend_col is None or provider_col is None:
    print("Skipped: requires provider identifier and spend column.")
else:
    top_share_sql = f"""
    WITH provider_totals AS (
        SELECT
            CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_id,
            SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_spend
        FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
        WHERE {qident(provider_col)} IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY 1
        HAVING SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) > 0
    ),
    ranked AS (
        SELECT
            provider_id,
            total_spend,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total_spend DESC) AS rn,
            COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_n,
            SUM(total_spend) OVER () AS total_spend_all
        FROM provider_totals
    )
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN rn <= CEIL(total_n * 0.01) THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(MAX(total_spend_all), 0) AS top_1pct_share,
        SUM(CASE WHEN rn <= CEIL(total_n * 0.05) THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(MAX(total_spend_all), 0) AS top_5pct_share,
        SUM(CASE WHEN rn <= CEIL(total_n * 0.10) THEN total_spend ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(MAX(total_spend_all), 0) AS top_10pct_share
    FROM ranked
    """
    top_share_wide = con.execute(top_share_sql).fetchdf()
    top_share = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"group": "Top 1%", "share_of_total_spend": float(top_share_wide.loc[0, "top_1pct_share"] or 0)},
            {"group": "Top 5%", "share_of_total_spend": float(top_share_wide.loc[0, "top_5pct_share"] or 0)},
            {"group": "Top 10%", "share_of_total_spend": float(top_share_wide.loc[0, "top_10pct_share"] or 0)},
        ]
    )
    top_share["share_of_total_spend_pct"] = top_share["share_of_total_spend"] * 100.0
    top_share.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "top_share_table.csv", index=False)
    top_share
```

### Ranked Top Providers by Spend

```{python}
top_providers = pd.DataFrame()
if primary_spend_col is None or provider_col is None:
    print("Skipped: requires provider identifier and spend column.")
else:
    if volume_col is not None:
        top_provider_sql = f"""
        WITH provider_totals AS (
            SELECT
                CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_id,
                SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_spend,
                SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(volume_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_volume
            FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
            WHERE {qident(provider_col)} IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY 1
        )
        SELECT provider_id, total_spend, total_volume
        FROM provider_totals
        WHERE total_spend > 0
          AND (total_volume IS NULL OR total_volume >= {MIN_VOLUME_FILTER})
        ORDER BY total_spend DESC
        LIMIT {TOP_N}
        """
    else:
        top_provider_sql = f"""
        WITH provider_totals AS (
            SELECT
                CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_id,
                SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_spend
            FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
            WHERE {qident(provider_col)} IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY 1
        )
        SELECT provider_id, total_spend
        FROM provider_totals
        WHERE total_spend > 0
        ORDER BY total_spend DESC
        LIMIT {TOP_N}
        """

    top_providers = con.execute(top_provider_sql).fetchdf()
    top_providers.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "top_providers_by_spend.csv", index=False)

    if top_providers.empty:
        print("Skipped: no provider-level spend rows after filters.")
    else:
        plot_df = top_providers.sort_values("total_spend", ascending=True)
        plt.figure(figsize=(8.5, 6.2))
        plt.barh(plot_df["provider_id"], plot_df["total_spend"], color="#457b9d")
        plt.xlabel("Total spend")
        plt.ylabel("Provider")
        title = f"Top {TOP_N} providers by {primary_spend_col}"
        if volume_col is not None:
            title += f" (volume >= {MIN_VOLUME_FILTER})"
        plt.title(title)
        plt.tight_layout()
        plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / "top_providers_by_spend.png", bbox_inches="tight")
        plt.show()

top_providers.head(10)
```

## HCPCS Rankings

### Top HCPCS by Record Count, Total Claims, and Cost per Claim

```{python}
hcpcs_by_record_count = pd.DataFrame()
hcpcs_by_total_claims = pd.DataFrame()
hcpcs_by_cost_per_claim = pd.DataFrame()

if not has_required_hcpcs_cols:
    print(f"Skipped: missing one or more required HCPCS columns: {required_hcpcs_cols}")
else:
    hcpcs_sql = f"""
    SELECT
        CAST({qident(HCPCS_COL)} AS VARCHAR) AS hcpcs_code,
        COUNT(*) AS record_count,
        SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(CLAIMS_COL)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_claims,
        SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(PAID_COL)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_paid,
        SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(PAID_COL)} AS DOUBLE))
          / NULLIF(SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(CLAIMS_COL)} AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS cost_per_claim
    FROM medicaid_spending
    WHERE {qident(HCPCS_COL)} IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1
    """
    hcpcs_agg = con.execute(hcpcs_sql).fetchdf()
    hcpcs_agg["record_count"] = hcpcs_agg["record_count"].fillna(0).astype("int64")
    hcpcs_agg["total_claims"] = hcpcs_agg["total_claims"].fillna(0.0)
    hcpcs_agg["total_paid"] = hcpcs_agg["total_paid"].fillna(0.0)

    hcpcs_by_record_count = (
        hcpcs_agg.sort_values("record_count", ascending=False)
        .head(HCPCS_TOP_N)
        .reset_index(drop=True)
    )
    hcpcs_by_total_claims = (
        hcpcs_agg.sort_values("total_claims", ascending=False)
        .head(HCPCS_TOP_N)
        .reset_index(drop=True)
    )
    hcpcs_by_cost_per_claim = (
        hcpcs_agg.loc[hcpcs_agg["total_claims"] >= MIN_HCPCS_CLAIMS_FOR_CPP]
        .sort_values("cost_per_claim", ascending=False)
        .head(HCPCS_TOP_N)
        .reset_index(drop=True)
    )

    hcpcs_by_record_count.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "top_hcpcs_by_record_count.csv", index=False)
    hcpcs_by_total_claims.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "top_hcpcs_by_total_claims.csv", index=False)
    hcpcs_by_cost_per_claim.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "top_hcpcs_by_cost_per_claim.csv", index=False)

    def plot_hcpcs_metric(df: pd.DataFrame, metric_col: str, title: str, out_name: str, color: str) -> None:
        if df.empty:
            print(f"Skipped figure `{out_name}`: source table is empty.")
            return
        plot_df = df.sort_values(metric_col, ascending=True)
        plt.figure(figsize=(9.0, 6.0))
        plt.barh(plot_df["hcpcs_code"], plot_df[metric_col], color=color)
        plt.xlabel(metric_col)
        plt.ylabel("HCPCS code")
        plt.title(title)
        plt.tight_layout()
        plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / out_name, bbox_inches="tight")
        plt.show()

    plot_hcpcs_metric(
        hcpcs_by_record_count,
        "record_count",
        f"Top {HCPCS_TOP_N} HCPCS by Record Count",
        "top_hcpcs_by_record_count.png",
        "#3a86ff",
    )
    plot_hcpcs_metric(
        hcpcs_by_total_claims,
        "total_claims",
        f"Top {HCPCS_TOP_N} HCPCS by Total Claims",
        "top_hcpcs_by_total_claims.png",
        "#2a9d8f",
    )
    plot_hcpcs_metric(
        hcpcs_by_cost_per_claim,
        "cost_per_claim",
        f"Top {HCPCS_TOP_N} HCPCS by Cost per Claim (claims >= {MIN_HCPCS_CLAIMS_FOR_CPP:,})",
        "top_hcpcs_by_cost_per_claim.png",
        "#e76f51",
    )

    hcpcs_rankings_generated = (
        not hcpcs_by_record_count.empty
        and not hcpcs_by_total_claims.empty
        and not hcpcs_by_cost_per_claim.empty
    )
    print("HCPCS rankings generated:", hcpcs_rankings_generated)
```

```{python}
if not hcpcs_by_record_count.empty:
    display(hcpcs_by_record_count)
```

```{python}
if not hcpcs_by_total_claims.empty:
    display(hcpcs_by_total_claims)
```

```{python}
if not hcpcs_by_cost_per_claim.empty:
    display(hcpcs_by_cost_per_claim)
```

## NPI-Specific Benchmarking

### Presence, Percentiles, and Month-to-Month Stability

```{python}
npi_slug = re.sub(r"[^0-9A-Za-z_-]+", "_", TARGET_NPI)
target_npi_sql = TARGET_NPI.replace("'", "''")

npi_presence = pd.DataFrame()
npi_role_breakdown = pd.DataFrame()
npi_monthly_metrics = pd.DataFrame()
npi_monthly_percentiles = pd.DataFrame()
npi_summary = pd.DataFrame()

if not has_required_npi_cols:
    status_df = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {
                "target_npi": TARGET_NPI,
                "npi_scope": NPI_SCOPE,
                "npi_present_in_data": False,
                "message": f"Skipped NPI section: required columns missing: {required_npi_cols}",
            }
        ]
    )
    status_df.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / f"npi_{npi_slug}_status.csv", index=False)
    print(status_df.loc[0, "message"])
    npi_section_completed = True
else:
    npi_presence_sql = f"""
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS billing_rows,
        SUM(CASE WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS servicing_rows,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                  OR TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS either_rows,
        MIN(
            CASE
                WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                  OR TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                THEN CAST({qident(MONTH_COL)} AS VARCHAR)
            END
        ) AS min_month,
        MAX(
            CASE
                WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                  OR TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                THEN CAST({qident(MONTH_COL)} AS VARCHAR)
            END
        ) AS max_month,
        COUNT(
            DISTINCT CASE
                WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                  OR TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                THEN CAST({qident(MONTH_COL)} AS VARCHAR)
            END
        ) AS months_present,
        COUNT(
            DISTINCT CASE
                WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                  OR TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                THEN CAST({qident(HCPCS_COL)} AS VARCHAR)
            END
        ) AS hcpcs_present
    FROM medicaid_spending
    """
    npi_presence = con.execute(npi_presence_sql).fetchdf()
    npi_present_in_data = bool((npi_presence.loc[0, "either_rows"] or 0) > 0)

    npi_role_sql = f"""
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
              AND TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}' THEN 'both'
            WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}' THEN 'billing_only'
            WHEN TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}' THEN 'servicing_only'
        END AS npi_role,
        COUNT(*) AS n_rows,
        SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(CLAIMS_COL)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_claims,
        SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(PAID_COL)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_paid
    FROM medicaid_spending
    WHERE TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
       OR TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY n_rows DESC
    """
    npi_role_breakdown = con.execute(npi_role_sql).fetchdf()

    if not npi_present_in_data:
        status_df = pd.DataFrame(
            [
                {
                    "target_npi": TARGET_NPI,
                    "npi_scope": NPI_SCOPE,
                    "npi_present_in_data": False,
                    "billing_rows": int(npi_presence.loc[0, "billing_rows"] or 0),
                    "servicing_rows": int(npi_presence.loc[0, "servicing_rows"] or 0),
                    "either_rows": int(npi_presence.loc[0, "either_rows"] or 0),
                    "months_present": int(npi_presence.loc[0, "months_present"] or 0),
                    "message": "Target NPI not present in BILLING_PROVIDER_NPI_NUM or SERVICING_PROVIDER_NPI_NUM.",
                }
            ]
        )
        status_df.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / f"npi_{npi_slug}_status.csv", index=False)
        print(status_df.loc[0, "message"])
        print("Percentile and month-to-month stability plots were skipped.")
        npi_section_completed = True
    else:
        provider_long_exact_sql = build_provider_long_view(NPI_SCOPE, "medicaid_spending")

        npi_monthly_sql = f"""
        WITH provider_long AS (
            {provider_long_exact_sql}
        )
        SELECT
            claim_month,
            SUM(total_paid) AS total_paid,
            SUM(total_claims) AS total_claims,
            SUM(total_paid) / NULLIF(SUM(total_claims), 0) AS cost_per_claim,
            COUNT(*) AS record_count
        FROM provider_long
        WHERE provider_npi = '{target_npi_sql}'
        GROUP BY 1
        ORDER BY claim_month
        """
        npi_monthly_metrics = con.execute(npi_monthly_sql).fetchdf()

        if not npi_monthly_metrics.empty:
            npi_monthly_metrics["mom_paid_pct_change"] = npi_monthly_metrics["total_paid"].pct_change() * 100.0
            npi_monthly_metrics.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / f"npi_{npi_slug}_monthly_metrics.csv", index=False)

            fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(11.0, 5.0))
            ax1.plot(npi_monthly_metrics["claim_month"], npi_monthly_metrics["total_paid"], color="#1d3557", marker="o")
            ax1.set_ylabel("Total paid", color="#1d3557")
            ax1.tick_params(axis="y", labelcolor="#1d3557")
            ax1.set_xlabel("Claim month")

            ax2 = ax1.twinx()
            ax2.plot(npi_monthly_metrics["claim_month"], npi_monthly_metrics["total_claims"], color="#e76f51", marker="o")
            ax2.set_ylabel("Total claims", color="#e76f51")
            ax2.tick_params(axis="y", labelcolor="#e76f51")

            plt.title(f"NPI {TARGET_NPI}: monthly paid and claims")
            plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha="right")
            plt.tight_layout()
            plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / f"npi_{npi_slug}_monthly_paid_claims.png", bbox_inches="tight")
            plt.show()

            if npi_monthly_metrics["mom_paid_pct_change"].notna().any():
                plt.figure(figsize=(11.0, 4.8))
                plt.bar(
                    npi_monthly_metrics["claim_month"],
                    npi_monthly_metrics["mom_paid_pct_change"],
                    color="#6a994e",
                )
                plt.axhline(0, color="black", linewidth=1)
                plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha="right")
                plt.ylabel("MoM paid % change")
                plt.xlabel("Claim month")
                plt.title(f"NPI {TARGET_NPI}: month-to-month paid stability")
                plt.tight_layout()
                plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / f"npi_{npi_slug}_mom_stability.png", bbox_inches="tight")
                plt.show()

        peer_source_relation = f"""
            (
                SELECT *
                FROM (
                    SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)
                ) sampled_pool
                WHERE NOT (
                    TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                    OR TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                )
                UNION ALL
                SELECT *
                FROM medicaid_spending
                WHERE TRIM(CAST({qident(BILLING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
                   OR TRIM(CAST({qident(SERVICING_NPI_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) = '{target_npi_sql}'
            ) peer_source
        """
        provider_long_peer_sql = build_provider_long_view(NPI_SCOPE, peer_source_relation)

        npi_percentile_sql = f"""
        WITH provider_long AS (
            {provider_long_peer_sql}
        ),
        provider_month AS (
            SELECT claim_month, provider_npi, SUM(total_paid) AS month_paid
            FROM provider_long
            WHERE claim_month IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        ),
        target_month AS (
            SELECT claim_month, month_paid AS target_month_paid
            FROM provider_month
            WHERE provider_npi = '{target_npi_sql}'
        ),
        ranked AS (
            SELECT
                pm.claim_month,
                tm.target_month_paid,
                COUNT(*) AS peer_count,
                SUM(CASE WHEN pm.month_paid <= tm.target_month_paid THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS le_count
            FROM provider_month pm
            JOIN target_month tm ON pm.claim_month = tm.claim_month
            GROUP BY 1, 2
        )
        SELECT
            claim_month,
            target_month_paid,
            peer_count,
            100.0 * le_count / NULLIF(peer_count, 0) AS month_paid_percentile
        FROM ranked
        ORDER BY claim_month
        """
        npi_monthly_percentiles = con.execute(npi_percentile_sql).fetchdf()
        if not npi_monthly_percentiles.empty:
            npi_monthly_percentiles.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / f"npi_{npi_slug}_monthly_percentiles.csv", index=False)
            plt.figure(figsize=(11.0, 4.8))
            plt.plot(
                npi_monthly_percentiles["claim_month"],
                npi_monthly_percentiles["month_paid_percentile"],
                color="#8338ec",
                marker="o",
            )
            plt.ylim(0, 100)
            plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha="right")
            plt.ylabel("Monthly paid percentile")
            plt.xlabel("Claim month")
            plt.title(f"NPI {TARGET_NPI}: monthly percentile vs peers ({NPI_SCOPE} scope)")
            plt.tight_layout()
            plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / f"npi_{npi_slug}_monthly_percentile.png", bbox_inches="tight")
            plt.show()

        overall_percentile_sql = f"""
        WITH provider_long AS (
            {provider_long_peer_sql}
        ),
        provider_totals AS (
            SELECT provider_npi, SUM(total_paid) AS total_paid
            FROM provider_long
            GROUP BY 1
        ),
        target_total AS (
            SELECT total_paid AS target_total_paid
            FROM provider_totals
            WHERE provider_npi = '{target_npi_sql}'
            LIMIT 1
        )
        SELECT
            target_total_paid,
            COUNT(*) AS peer_provider_count,
            100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN provider_totals.total_paid <= target_total.target_total_paid THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
                / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS overall_paid_percentile
        FROM provider_totals
        CROSS JOIN target_total
        """
        overall_percentile = con.execute(overall_percentile_sql).fetchdf()

        dataset_month_stats_sql = f"""
        SELECT
            COUNT(DISTINCT CAST({qident(MONTH_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) AS dataset_month_count,
            MIN(CAST({qident(MONTH_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) AS dataset_min_month,
            MAX(CAST({qident(MONTH_COL)} AS VARCHAR)) AS dataset_max_month
        FROM medicaid_spending
        """
        dataset_month_stats = con.execute(dataset_month_stats_sql).fetchdf()

        observed_months = int(npi_monthly_metrics["claim_month"].nunique()) if not npi_monthly_metrics.empty else 0
        dataset_month_count = int(dataset_month_stats.loc[0, "dataset_month_count"] or 0)
        missing_months = max(dataset_month_count - observed_months, 0)
        cv_paid = safe_ratio(
            npi_monthly_metrics["total_paid"].std(ddof=1) if len(npi_monthly_metrics) > 1 else np.nan,
            npi_monthly_metrics["total_paid"].mean() if not npi_monthly_metrics.empty else np.nan,
        )

        npi_summary = pd.DataFrame(
            [
                {
                    "target_npi": TARGET_NPI,
                    "npi_scope": NPI_SCOPE,
                    "npi_present_in_data": True,
                    "observed_months": observed_months,
                    "dataset_month_count": dataset_month_count,
                    "missing_months_in_dataset_range": missing_months,
                    "dataset_min_month": dataset_month_stats.loc[0, "dataset_min_month"],
                    "dataset_max_month": dataset_month_stats.loc[0, "dataset_max_month"],
                    "npi_min_month": npi_presence.loc[0, "min_month"],
                    "npi_max_month": npi_presence.loc[0, "max_month"],
                    "months_present": int(npi_presence.loc[0, "months_present"] or 0),
                    "hcpcs_present": int(npi_presence.loc[0, "hcpcs_present"] or 0),
                    "billing_rows": int(npi_presence.loc[0, "billing_rows"] or 0),
                    "servicing_rows": int(npi_presence.loc[0, "servicing_rows"] or 0),
                    "either_rows": int(npi_presence.loc[0, "either_rows"] or 0),
                    "overall_paid_percentile": float(overall_percentile.loc[0, "overall_paid_percentile"] or np.nan)
                    if not overall_percentile.empty
                    else np.nan,
                    "peer_provider_count": float(overall_percentile.loc[0, "peer_provider_count"] or np.nan)
                    if not overall_percentile.empty
                    else np.nan,
                    "coefficient_of_variation_paid": cv_paid,
                }
            ]
        )
        npi_summary.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / f"npi_{npi_slug}_summary.csv", index=False)
        npi_section_completed = True
```

```{python}
if not npi_presence.empty:
    display(npi_presence)
if not npi_role_breakdown.empty:
    display(npi_role_breakdown)
if not npi_summary.empty:
    display(npi_summary)
```

## Multivariate and Segmentation Diagnostics

### Spend vs Volume (Provider-Level Scatter, Log-Log)

```{python}
if primary_spend_col is None or provider_col is None or volume_col is None:
    print("Skipped: requires provider, spend, and volume columns.")
else:
    scatter_sql = f"""
    WITH provider_totals AS (
        SELECT
            CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS provider_id,
            SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_spend,
            SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(volume_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_volume
        FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
        WHERE {qident(provider_col)} IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY 1
    ),
    sampled AS (
        SELECT total_spend, total_volume
        FROM provider_totals
        WHERE total_spend > 0 AND total_volume > 0
        USING SAMPLE 50000 ROWS (reservoir)
    )
    SELECT total_spend, total_volume
    FROM sampled
    """
    scatter_df = con.execute(scatter_sql).fetchdf()

    if scatter_df.empty:
        print("Skipped: no positive spend/volume provider rows available.")
    else:
        plt.figure(figsize=(7.5, 6.0))
        plt.hexbin(
            scatter_df["total_volume"],
            scatter_df["total_spend"],
            gridsize=45,
            bins="log",
            mincnt=1,
            cmap="viridis",
        )
        cbar = plt.colorbar()
        cbar.set_label("log10(count)")
        plt.xscale("log")
        plt.yscale("log")
        plt.xlabel(f"Provider-level {volume_col}")
        plt.ylabel(f"Provider-level {primary_spend_col}")
        plt.title("Provider-level spend vs volume (log-log hexbin)")
        plt.tight_layout()
        plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / "scatter_spend_vs_volume_hexbin.png", bbox_inches="tight")
        plt.show()
```

### Correlation Heatmap (Numeric Measures)

```{python}
corr_candidates = list(dict.fromkeys(roles.get("spend", []) + roles.get("volume", [])))
corr_candidates = [c for c in corr_candidates if c in numeric_cols]

if len(corr_candidates) < 2:
    corr_candidates = [c for c in numeric_cols if c not in {year_col, provider_col}][:8]
else:
    corr_candidates = corr_candidates[:8]

if len(corr_candidates) < 2:
    print("Skipped: fewer than two numeric columns available for correlation.")
else:
    corr_select = ", ".join([f"TRY_CAST({qident(c)} AS DOUBLE) AS {qident(c)}" for c in corr_candidates])
    corr_sql = f"""
    WITH sampled AS (
        SELECT {corr_select}
        FROM medicaid_spending
        USING SAMPLE 100000 ROWS (reservoir)
    )
    SELECT *
    FROM sampled
    """
    corr_sample = con.execute(corr_sql).fetchdf()
    corr_mat = corr_sample[corr_candidates].corr(numeric_only=True)
    corr_mat.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "correlation_matrix.csv")

    plt.figure(figsize=(7.5, 6.2))
    sns.heatmap(
        corr_mat,
        cmap="coolwarm",
        center=0,
        vmin=-1,
        vmax=1,
        annot=True,
        fmt=".2f",
        square=True,
        linewidths=0.5,
    )
    plt.title("Correlation heatmap (sampled numeric metrics)")
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / "correlation_heatmap.png", bbox_inches="tight")
    plt.show()
```

### Group Summaries (Geo/Specialty/Taxonomy)

```{python}
group_candidates = []
for role_key in ["geo", "specialty", "taxonomy"]:
    group_candidates.extend(roles.get(role_key, []))
group_candidates = list(dict.fromkeys([c for c in group_candidates if c in all_cols]))[:3]

group_summaries = {}
if primary_spend_col is None:
    print("Skipped: no primary spend column detected.")
elif not group_candidates:
    print("Skipped: no geo/specialty/taxonomy columns detected.")
else:
    for group_col in group_candidates:
        if provider_col is not None:
            group_sql = f"""
            SELECT
                CAST({qident(group_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS group_value,
                COUNT(*) AS n_rows,
                COUNT(DISTINCT CAST({qident(provider_col)} AS VARCHAR)) AS n_unique_providers,
                SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_spend,
                AVG(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_spend
            FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
            WHERE {qident(group_col)} IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY 1
            HAVING SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) IS NOT NULL
            ORDER BY total_spend DESC
            LIMIT 20
            """
        else:
            group_sql = f"""
            SELECT
                CAST({qident(group_col)} AS VARCHAR) AS group_value,
                COUNT(*) AS n_rows,
                SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS total_spend,
                AVG(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_spend
            FROM (SELECT * FROM medicaid_spending USING SAMPLE {HEAVY_QUERY_SAMPLE_ROWS} ROWS (reservoir)) sampled_data
            WHERE {qident(group_col)} IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY 1
            HAVING SUM(TRY_CAST({qident(primary_spend_col)} AS DOUBLE)) IS NOT NULL
            ORDER BY total_spend DESC
            LIMIT 20
            """

        gdf = con.execute(group_sql).fetchdf()
        group_summaries[group_col] = gdf
        gdf.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / f"group_summary_{group_col}.csv", index=False)

        if not gdf.empty:
            plt.figure(figsize=(9.0, 5.0))
            plot_df = gdf.sort_values("total_spend", ascending=True)
            plt.barh(plot_df["group_value"], plot_df["total_spend"], color="#6d597a")
            plt.xlabel("Total spend")
            plt.ylabel(group_col)
            plt.title(f"Top groups by total spend: {group_col}")
            plt.tight_layout()
            safe_col = re.sub(r"[^A-Za-z0-9_-]+", "_", group_col)
            plt.savefig(FIG_DIR / f"group_summary_{safe_col}.png", bbox_inches="tight")
            plt.show()
```

```{python}
if group_summaries:
    for col_name, gdf in group_summaries.items():
        print(f"\nTop rows for {col_name}")
        display(gdf.head(10))
```

## Validation Checks and Closing Summary

```{python}
validation_results = {
    "ingestion_row_count_gt_zero": bool(row_count > 0),
    "schema_has_any_column": bool(len(all_cols) > 0),
    "role_detection_returned_dict": isinstance(roles, dict),
    "missingness_in_bounds": bool(missing_long["pct_missing"].between(0, 100).all()),
    "primary_spend_found": bool(primary_spend_col is not None),
    "hcpcs_rankings_generated": bool(hcpcs_rankings_generated),
    "npi_section_completed": bool(npi_section_completed),
    "npi_present_in_data": bool(npi_present_in_data),
}

validation_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [{"check": k, "passed": v} for k, v in validation_results.items()]
).sort_values("passed", ascending=True)

validation_df.to_csv(OUTPUT_DIR / "validation_checks.csv", index=False)
validation_df
```

```{python}
print("Notebook complete.")
print(f"Figures saved to: {FIG_DIR}")
print(f"Tabular outputs saved to: {OUTPUT_DIR}")
print("If a section says 'Skipped', it means required columns were not detected.")
```
